version_description: It's simple chords and sounds great

versions.version_description: I've included much needed chords in the bridge, as well as adlibs in parenthesis of which are missing from other contributions. Also, for Organized and concise viewing with line breaks separating sections.

tuning: Eb Ab Db Gb Bb Eb

recommended.version_description: It's just capo on 3 and Em C B7 the whole way through.

content:
Tune half step down

E: 022100
C#m7: X46600
Asus2: X02200
Bsus4: X24400


  [VERSE 1]
[tab]                 [ch]E[/ch]
It's too hard to sleep[/tab]

I got the sheets on the floor
[tab]           [ch]C#m7[/ch]
Nothing on me[/tab]

And I can't take it no more
[tab]                 [ch]Asus2[/ch]
it's a hundred degrees[/tab]

I got one foot out the door
[tab]             [ch]C#m7[/ch]             [ch]Bsus4[/ch]
Where are my keys? 'Cause I gotta leave, yeah[/tab]


  [VERSE 2]
[tab]                   [ch]E[/ch]
In the back of the cab[/tab]

I tip the driver, 'head of time
[tab]             [ch]C#m7[/ch]
Get me there fast[/tab]

I got your body on my mind
[tab]          [ch]Asus2[/ch]
I want it bad[/tab]
[tab]                                     [ch]C#m7[/ch]      [ch]Bsus4[/ch]
Ooh, just the thought of you gets me so high, so high[/tab]


  [CHORUS]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                              [ch]C#m7[/ch]
Girl, you're the one I want to want me[/tab]
[tab]                               [ch]Asus2[/ch]
And if you want, hey girl, you got me[/tab]
[tab]                                  [ch]C#m7[/ch]             [ch]Bsus4[/ch]
There's nothing I know I wouldn't do, I wouldn't do[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]E[/ch]
Just to get up next you[/tab]
[tab]                               [ch]C#m7[/ch]
Girl, you're the one I want to want me[/tab]
[tab]                               [ch]Asus2[/ch]
And if you want, hey girl, you got me[/tab]

[tab]                        [ch]E[/ch]
Just to get up next you[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]C#m7[/ch]
Just to get up next you[/tab]


  [VERSE 3]
[tab]             [ch]E[/ch]
You open the door[/tab]
[tab]                                         [ch]C#m7[/ch]
Wearing nothing but a smile, down to the floor[/tab]
[tab]                                    [ch]Asus2[/ch]
And you whisper in my ear, "baby I'm yours"[/tab]
[tab]                                        [ch]C#m7[/ch]       [ch]Bsus4[/ch]
